title: Flickingeria eurorum

intro: Flickingeria eurorum, also known as Euror's Flickingeria, is a species of orchid endemic to Sri Lanka. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its potential antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Flickingeria eurorum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Flickingeria eurorum is often prepared as a decoction or a powder, and is used to treat fever, cough, and cold, as well as to improve respiratory health.
